name: insect
description: Insect crawler with fingerprint randomization - CLI, API server, and MCP server

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd packages/mcp && npm install
scripts.test:unit: vitest run tests/fingerprint.test.js tests/formatters.test.js tests/keys.test.js tests/auth-middleware.test.js tests/observability-metrics.test.js
scripts.test:live: cross-env LIVE_INTEGRATION=1 vitest run tests/cli.test.js tests/routes.test.js tests/engine-integration.test.js
